ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISNEW(), TODAY() >= DATE(2024, 8, 1), OR( ISBLANK(Product_Code__c), ISBLANK(Tier__c), ISBLANK(Price__c), ISBLANK(Price_Book__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Product Code, Tier, Price, and Price Book must be populated for records created on or after August 1, 2024.
